proposals.title: Wire validate_cpus() into Actor::activate()
proposals.spec_text: The framework MUST validate CPU IDs against the system's available CPUs and return an error for invalid IDs before spawning the thread
proposals.actual: validate_cpus() exists but is not called in Actor::activate()
proposals.resolution: Add validate_cpus() call in Actor::activate() before thread::spawn, after affinity clone
proposals.rationale: The validation function was written specifically for this purpose but never wired in — straightforward omission

proposals.title: NUMA-local channel buffer allocation uses first-touch
proposals.spec_text: Channel buffers SHOULD be allocated on the NUMA node associated with the actor's CPU affinity
proposals.actual: new_numa() constructors discard node parameter, rely on first-touch policy
proposals.resolution: Update spec FR-016 to document first-touch-only design as intentional
proposals.rationale: Spec already contains clarification explaining first-touch approach. Integrating NumaAllocator into ring buffers would require replacing Vec/Box with raw mmap — significant complexity for marginal benefit

proposals.title: Handler state NUMA locality via first-touch (remove framework integration requirement)
proposals.spec_text: Actor handler state SHOULD be allocated on the NUMA node where possible
proposals.actual: No framework integration point exists; spec already acknowledges first-touch approach
proposals.resolution: Reword FR-017 to document first-touch as the design, remove implication of framework-level allocator integration
proposals.rationale: Spec already acknowledges this is intended. Adding with_numa_allocator() builder adds API complexity for niche use case

proposals.title: Actor implements IUnknown directly (not via define_component! macro)
proposals.spec_text: Actor components MUST use the same component, interface, and receptacle model (defined via the existing macro system)
proposals.actual: Actor<M,H> is hand-coded generic struct with manual IUnknown impl; macro cannot support generics
proposals.resolution: Update FR-002 to clarify actors must conform to the component model (IUnknown trait) but may implement directly when generics require it
proposals.rationale: define_component! cannot produce generic types. Hand-coded IUnknown is correct and tested. Observable behavior is identical.

proposals.title: Add third-party wiring test for actors/channels via IUnknown
proposals.spec_text: Actor and channel components MUST support both first-party and third-party binding
proposals.actual: No test demonstrates IUnknown-based wiring for actors/channels
proposals.resolution: Add integration test demonstrating IUnknown query-based wiring; clarify spec that actors use IUnknown queries (not receptacle-based bind()) for third-party discovery
proposals.rationale: Actors/channels expose endpoints as provided interfaces, not receptacles, so bind() is not the right mechanism — IUnknown query is

proposals.title: Add channel registry factory test
proposals.spec_text: Actor and channel components MUST be registerable in the existing component registry
proposals.actual: Only actors tested with registry; channels never registered
proposals.resolution: Add integration test registering channel factories and creating channels by name via registry
proposals.rationale: Channels already implement IUnknown; this is a testing gap, not a code gap

proposals.title: Update initial reference count spec to describe observable semantics
proposals.spec_text: Factory functions MUST return components with an initial reference count of 1
proposals.actual: Arc::strong_count > 1 due to internal self-referential interface map Arcs
proposals.resolution: Reword to: 'Factory functions MUST return a single ComponentRef. Internal ref count may be higher due to implementation details. Component destroyed when all external refs dropped.'
proposals.rationale: Implementation is correct. Self-referential Arcs are needed for type-safe interface queries. Changing would require unsafe raw pointer casting.

proposals.title: Add register_simple integration test
proposals.spec_text: The registry MUST provide a simplified factory registration method (register_simple)
proposals.actual: Implemented with doc-test but no integration test
proposals.resolution: Add integration test in tests/registry.rs exercising register_simple

proposals.title: Add compile_fail doc tests for macro error paths
proposals.spec_text: The framework MUST produce compile-time errors when macro usage is incorrect
proposals.actual: Errors exist but no automated test validates them
proposals.resolution: Add compile_fail doc tests to macro documentation covering key error paths (no methods, &mut self, missing version). No extra dependencies.
proposals.rationale: compile_fail doc tests validate error paths without adding dev-dependencies, consistent with minimal-dependency constitution

proposals.title: Add Receptacle to prelude re-exports
proposals.spec_text: The framework MUST provide a prelude module that re-exports the most commonly used types
proposals.actual: Prelude missing Receptacle and query_interface! documentation
proposals.resolution: Add 'pub use crate::receptacle::Receptacle;' to prelude.rs; add doc note about query_interface! availability
proposals.rationale: Receptacle is commonly used; its absence is an oversight

proposals.title: Add compile-only benchmark check to CI + update SC-005
proposals.spec_text: All Criterion benchmarks demonstrate no regressions between releases
proposals.actual: Benchmarks exist but CI only runs fmt, clippy, test, doc
proposals.resolution: Add 'cargo bench --no-run' to CI gate. Update SC-005 to: benchmarks must compile; regression detection performed manually before releases.
proposals.rationale: Compile-only avoids flaky CI from non-deterministic benchmark runtime while ensuring benchmarks stay buildable

proposals.title: Fill doc test gaps (InterfaceMap::info, prelude)
proposals.spec_text: 100% of public APIs have passing doc tests and unit tests
proposals.actual: InterfaceMap::info() lacks doc test; prelude doc test is inert
proposals.resolution: Add meaningful doc tests to InterfaceMap::info() and improve prelude module doc test
